data.title: [ticket link]: LINK.json files not auto-committed after creation -> untracked files remain in .tickets-tracker/
data.description: After running `.claude/scripts/dso ticket link` to add dependency relationships between tickets, the resulting LINK.json event files are written to `.tickets-tracker/` as untracked files but are not automatically committed and pushed. Other ticket operations (create, comment, transition) auto-commit their event files; link does not, leaving the dependency data in an unpersisted state until a manual `git add` + `git commit` + `git push` is performed on the tickets worktree.
